name: note-c architecture map
purpose: Portable C SDK for communicating with a Blues Notecard over serial or I2C.
principles: Put platform-specific behavior behind hooks or adapter libraries.
Treat note.h and hook signatures as compatibility contracts.
Update this map, architecture.html, and ARCHITECTURE.md when architecture-relevant code changes land.

components.name: Public API
components.responsibility: Public functions, constants, typedefs, version metadata, request helpers, and hook contracts.

components.name: Internal declarations
components.responsibility: Private declarations shared across implementation files.

components.name: Request/response core
components.responsibility: Request lifecycle, transaction orchestration, response parsing, timeout/retry flow.

components.name: Platform hooks
components.responsibility: Registration and invocation of memory, mutex, timing, debug, serial, and I2C hooks.

components.name: Serial transport
components.responsibility: Serial send/receive and chunked serial transport behavior.

components.name: I2C transport
components.responsibility: I2C send/receive and chunked I2C transport behavior.

components.name: JSON model and helpers
components.responsibility: Bundled JSON object representation and helper APIs.

components.name: Portable helpers
components.responsibility: Utility behavior, formatting/parsing helpers, encoding, constants, and user-agent support.

components.name: Unit tests
components.responsibility: Mock-backed tests for core SDK behavior without physical Notecard hardware.

components.name: Architecture and API docs
components.responsibility: Human and agent-facing architecture, ADRs, and generated API documentation.

flows.name: Unit test flow
steps: asserted request, JSON, hook, or transport behavior

externalSystems.name: Notecard
externalSystems.role: Device that receives JSON requests and returns JSON responses over serial or I2C.

externalSystems.name: Notehub
externalSystems.role: Cloud service reached by Notecard; note-c does not communicate with Notehub directly.

updateTriggers: Changes to note.h public APIs, typedefs, constants, or hook signatures.
Changes to request lifecycle, timeout, retry, memory ownership, or response handling.
Changes to serial/I2C framing, chunking, transmit, or receive behavior.
Changes to JSON representation or helper semantics.
Changes to adapter expectations, build/test strategy, release strategy, or versioning.
filesToUpdateTogether: docs/architecture/decisions/*.md when a durable design decision changes
